VALUES ('2c904a55-0b08-4b23-a60d-77dbb529a939', 'Which choice best describes the overall structure of the passage?', 'Historians examining trade route 10 note that camel caravans carried not only goods but also astronomical tables, spreading navigation techniques across deserts long before printed maps existed.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"to explain a cause-and-effect relationship","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage develops an explanatory arc matching: to explain a cause-and-effect relationship."},{"id":"B","text":"to list unrelated facts with no connection","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage connects ideas; it is not a random list."},{"id":"C","text":"to argue that research should be abandoned","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage presents research rather than rejecting it."},{"id":"D","text":"to provide a chronological biography of one person","is_correct":false,"explanation":"No single biography is the focus."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage is organized to explain a cause-and-effect relationship, introducing context and then supporting evidence.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Text Structure and Purpose', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'TSP', NULL, 'hard', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('14998964-1909-4608-afb8-66b1b56a70d0', 'As used in the passage, "tenuous" most nearly means', 'Engineers prototyping turbine 7 demonstrated that angled blades harvest more energy from low wind speeds, a design inspired by the shape of humpback whale fins. The team''s initial conclusion was tenuous until additional trials clarified the pattern.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"obvious","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Opposite or unrelated to context."},{"id":"B","text":"fragile","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Check context: trials clarified the pattern."},{"id":"C","text":"permanent","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Does not fit the sentence''s logic."},{"id":"D","text":"loud","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too far from contextual meaning."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Context shows the conclusion needed revision; "tenuous" fits the intended meaning in that situation.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Words in Context', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'WIC', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('90478473-0a7b-41bc-bb10-a81f11c750b1', 'As used in the passage, "scrutinize" most nearly means', 'Historians examining trade route 10 note that camel caravans carried not only goods but also astronomical tables, spreading navigation techniques across deserts long before printed maps existed. The team''s initial conclusion was scrutinize until additional trials clarified the pattern.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"praise","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Opposite or unrelated to context."},{"id":"B","text":"examine closely","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Check context: trials clarified the pattern."},{"id":"C","text":"forget","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Does not fit the sentence''s logic."},{"id":"D","text":"sell","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too far from contextual meaning."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'Context shows the conclusion needed revision; "scrutinize" fits the intended meaning in that situation.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Words in Context', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'WIC', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('93b9875a-6405-4605-ad2f-2d2ff8209894', 'As used in the passage, "mitigate" most nearly means', 'In her essay on urban soundscapes, writer 11 argues that city planners should treat noise pollution as a public-health issue, citing studies linking traffic noise to elevated stress hormones. (id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('2f8045ae-c30b-4ab2-a65a-73f87a0bd1cd', 'Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?', 'The first trial failed to detect an effect. ______ the second trial, with more participants, showed a clear pattern.', NULL, '[{"id":"A","text":"Nevertheless","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Signals contrast between the two trials."},{"id":"B","text":"Thus","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Implies direct consequence; the contrast fits better."},{"id":"C","text":"Meanwhile","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Suggests simultaneity, which is not stated."},{"id":"D","text":"In contrast","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Would introduce an example, not a contrasting result."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'A contrast transition (Nevertheless) links a failed trial to a later successful one.', NULL, 'Expression of Ideas', 'Transitions', 'reading_writing', 'expression', 'TRA', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
